basics.name: Deeksha Varshney
basics.label: Assistant Professor · Computer Science & Engineering
basics.summary: Assistant Professor at IIT Jodhpur working on Natural Language Processing, Dialogue Systems, Reasoning, Interpretability in LLMs, NLP for Healthcare and Climate, and Multilingual Language Models.

work.name: IIT Jodhpur
work.summary: Faculty member at SAIDE, IIT Jodhpur, focusing on NLP, Dialogue Systems, Reasoning, Interpretability in LLMs, Healthcare and Climate AI.

work.name: National University of Singapore
work.summary: Worked on entity hallucination in dialogue systems, interpretability, climate AI and sustainable finance under Prof. Gianmarco Mengaldo.

work.name: National University of Singapore
work.summary: Research on uncertainty estimation in Large Language Models under Prof. Yang You.

summary: Teaching an advanced course on Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Natural Language Processing (NLP) at IIT Jodhpur.
Covered topics including Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformer models, NLP pipelines, and hands-on projects.
Supervised student projects and guided research-oriented exercises in AI and NLP.
